name: cursorqb
description: Five-step, goal-backed project planning workflow for Cursor with a repo-aware intake and existing-project autopsy: a senior-architect master plan, a Step 1.5 autopsy, autonomous phase decomposition, a coverage/quality audit validated by a bundled read-only checker, and a gated implementation step. Produces English planning docs under Planner-docs/. In-session and automatic via the define-goal skill.
